case_title: WU, LILY VS LEE, ANTONIO DBA 59 MINUTES PHOTO EXPRESS INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,815.92 FILED BY WU, LILY AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, ANTONIO DBA 59 MINUTES PHOTO EXPRESS INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-11-2000 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506
